name: route-of-administration-field
title: Route of Administration Field
description: Compact single-select for medication route with icons and a "More" overflow.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the selected route code, or undefined when deselected.

props.name: routes
props.description: Available routes; override to match the formulary. Each is { value, abbr, label, icon? }.

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: How many routes show inline before the rest collapse into "More".

clinicalNotes: Label routes in full on selection (IM ≠ IV ≠ IT — wrong-route errors are catastrophic); never rely on the abbreviation or icon alone, so the full route name is always shown once a route is picked. The available routes are caller-configurable because the valid set depends on the formulary and the drug. A selected route stays visible inline even when it lives in the overflow list.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes toggle-group + popover + button.
